scripts.build:typescript: pnpm --dir packages/core/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/oauth/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/admin/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/adminAudit/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/engine build && pnpm --dir packages/sdk/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/transport/a2a/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/identity/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/revocation/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/transport/mcp/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/connectors/express/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/connectors/fastmcp/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/connectors/postgres/ts build && pnpm --dir packages/connectors/redis/ts build && pnpm --dir apps/api build && pnpm --dir apps/coordinator build && pnpm --dir apps/control build
scripts.ci: pnpm --filter @caracalai/engine sync-embedded && pnpm run build:typescript && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.test: pnpm run test:typescript && pnpm run test:go && pnpm run test:python
scripts.test:go: bash scripts/runGoSourceTests.sh go test ./packages/core/go/... ./services/sts/... ./services/audit/... ./services/gateway/... ./services/coordinator-relay/... ./packages/transport/mcp/go/... ./packages/connectors/nethttp/go/... ./packages/connectors/redis/go/... ./packages/identity/go/... ./packages/oauth/go/... ./packages/revocation/go/... ./packages/sdk/go/... && go test ./tests/go/unit/revocation ./tests/go/unit/transport/mcp ./tests/go/unit/identity ./tests/go/contract/interoperability ./tests/go/property
scripts.test:typescript: pnpm --dir apps/api test && pnpm --dir apps/coordinator test && pnpm --dir apps/control test && pnpm --dir apps/runtime test && pnpm --dir apps/console test && pnpm --dir packages/core/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/identity/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/admin/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/sdk/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/transport/a2a/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/oauth/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/revocation/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/transport/mcp/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/connectors/express/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/connectors/fastmcp/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/connectors/postgres/ts test && pnpm --dir packages/connectors/redis/ts test
